context: Evaluate a generated Go + Docker Makefile for version embedding, Docker target correctness, and security

checklist.name: Modern header present
checklist.description: Makefile begins with SHELL := bash, .ONESHELL:, .SHELLFLAGS := -eu -o pipefail -c, .DELETE_ON_ERROR:, .SUFFIXES:, and both MAKEFLAGS += lines

checklist.name: Version and commit ldflags
checklist.description: The build recipe passes -ldflags with -X flags embedding both VERSION and the git commit hash using $(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD) or equivalent

checklist.name: REGISTRY variable uses ?=
checklist.description: REGISTRY is declared with ?= so callers can override it; VERSION also uses ?= or is overridable

checklist.name: docker-push depends on docker-build
checklist.description: docker-push lists docker-build as a prerequisite, ensuring build completes before push

checklist.name: docker-push error handling
checklist.description: docker-push recipe uses || { echo ...; exit 1; } or equivalent for both the versioned and :latest tag push operations

checklist.name: Parallel safety for Docker targets
checklist.description: Either .NOTPARALLEL is declared for docker targets, or dependency ordering prevents parallel execution of docker-build and docker-push

checklist.name: No hardcoded credentials
checklist.description: Makefile contains no tokens, passwords, or secret values; any authentication is delegated to environment variables or external tooling

checklist.name: .PHONY completeness
checklist.description: All non-file targets including docker-build, docker-push, docker-run, all, build, test, clean, and help are listed in .PHONY
